prohibited_paths: runtime React or JavaScript in trusted chrome
runtime CSS parser in trusted chrome release path
preconditions: TASK-000003 IPC and command authority are reviewed or the shell prototype is isolated
all compared UI adapters implement equivalent scope

checked no-claim adapter contract inventory is treated as planning evidence until ADR-0013, complete toolkit-neutral state, command, surface, accessibility, diagnostic, and adapter contracts, native adapter prototype, no-toolkit-owned-authority negative tests, and owner review exist

checked no-claim framework bake-off inventory is treated as planning evidence until three-adapter or owner-approved reduced reference-shell evidence, ADR-0014, license/provenance review, accessibility evidence, IME/keyboard evidence, page-surface evidence, crash/GPU-loss evidence, and performance evidence exist
license and dependency review is included before selecting a toolkit
checked no-claim window/input/accessibility workflow inventory is treated as planning evidence until reference-platform and manual assistive-technology evidence exists

checked no-claim page-surface composition inventory is treated as planning evidence until UI-GATE-7, ADR-0016, typed page-surface handles, brokered surface handle, document and device generation, software fallback, and owner-review evidence exists

checked no-claim native UI readiness-review template is treated as planning evidence only and cannot be cited for toolkit selection, accessibility readiness, page-surface approval, release-path UI approval, or production readiness
queue status remains proposed; this specified manifest is non-executable
a named owner and named independent reviewer replace the role placeholders before this manifest can become ready
acceptance_criteria: checked no-claim adapter contract inventory is treated as planning evidence until ADR-0013, toolkit-neutral state, command, surface, accessibility, diagnostic, and adapter contract evidence, native adapter prototype evidence, no toolkit-owned authority negative tests, and owner review exist
three-adapter or owner-approved reduced bake-off scope is recorded with equivalent shell tasks

checked no-claim framework bake-off inventory is treated as planning evidence until equivalent Slint, Vizia, and Floem or GPUI adapter evidence, ADR-0014, accessibility, IME, keyboard, crash, GPU-loss, startup, memory, binary, latency, frame-pacing, energy, license, dependency, provenance, replacement, and package/runtime-exclusion evidence exists

page-surface composition, design-token and component fixtures, accessibility, IME, keyboard, crash, GPU-loss, startup, memory, binary, latency, frame-pacing, energy, license, dependency, and provenance evidence requirements are explicit
checked no-claim component fixture inventory is treated as planning evidence until rendered or equivalent adapter-specific fixtures exist

checked no-claim window/input/accessibility workflow inventory is treated as planning evidence until executable reference-platform workflow matrix, page-tree composition, input, IME, keyboard, clipboard, drag-drop, localization, zoom, high contrast, reduced motion, manual assistive-technology, screen-reader, latency, crash, renderer-hang, GPU-loss, UI-GATE-7, and UI-GATE-10 evidence exists

checked no-claim page-surface composition inventory is treated as planning evidence until executable resize, scale, damage, input, IME, accessibility, occlusion, capture, renderer-crash, GPU-loss, software fallback, latency, frame-pacing, typed page-surface handles, brokered surface handle, document and device generations, UI-GATE-7, ADR-0016, and owner-review evidence exists

checked no-claim native UI readiness-review template is treated as planning evidence until a real owner-reviewed native UI readiness review replaces null reviewers, selected toolkit, adapter strategy, and reference-platform fields with evidence beyond the template
toolkit-neutral UI state remains independent of any chosen renderer
no toolkit is promoted without ADR and license/provenance review
negative_tests: trusted chrome cannot depend on a webview, Electron, Tauri, system webview, Node, runtime React, runtime JavaScript, runtime DOM, or runtime CSS parser
native adapter prototype success cannot be claimed before ADR-0013, explicit adapter contract evidence, and no toolkit-owned authority negative tests exist
framework bake-off success cannot be claimed from a single adapter, empty-window demo, qualitative source observation, or unchecked license/provenance assumption

UI success cannot hide missing keyboard, screen-reader, manual assistive-technology, IME, resize, scale, damage, occlusion, capture, crash, renderer-hang, GPU-loss, software fallback, typed page-surface handle, brokered surface handle, document and device generations, page-tree, page-surface, latency, frame-pacing, energy, or memory behavior

checked no-claim native UI readiness-review template cannot be cited as toolkit selection, accessibility readiness, page-surface approval, trusted-chrome readiness, release-path UI approval, TASK-000006 execution approval, or production readiness
adapter-specific state cannot become the product source of truth

rollback.strategy: Keep adapter prototypes isolated and revert any toolkit-specific source if review rejects its authority, license, or runtime model.
